description.value: Your ears are feathery and notched for finely tuned detection of sound and changes in pressure, often surprising those who thought they were hiding themselves or their machinations. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Perception checks to [[/act seek]] or for initiative rolls when opposed by @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Hidden] or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Undetected] creatures, or to [[/act sense-motive]] to determine if a creature is verbally Lying. This benefit doesn't apply if you can't hear, or if the other creatures involved are incapable of making sound (for example, if it's affected by a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Silence] spell).
